title: Dichaea rodriguesii
taxonomy: Dichaea rodriguesii is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Dichaea, which is a group of orchids primarily found in Central and South America. Within the Orchidaceae family, Dichaea rodriguesii falls under the subfamily Epidendroideae. This classification suggests a close relationship with other orchids in the same subfamily. Further studies are needed to confirm the exact classification and taxonomic position of Dichaea rodriguesii.
